mechanism_narrative: Rising retail sales over the prior 3 months signals resilient household demand and near-term revenue support for index constituents, so higher RSAFS growth predicts positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot RSAFS 705180 as of one month before 2024-05-15
failure_condition: Reject if the walk-forward Rank IC between 3-month RSAFS growth and 20-day S&P 500 returns is below 0.03 for any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate crosses above 5.0%, restrictive policy raises equity discount rates and tightens financing conditions, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot FEDFUNDS 5.33 as of one month before 2024-05-15
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations have positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or mean triggered returns exceed the unconditional mean.

mechanism_narrative: A rising unemployment rate combined with slowing payroll gains signals weakening labor income and recession risk, causing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by at least 0.3pp over 3 months and PAYEMS 3-month growth decelerates
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot UNRATE 3.9 and PAYEMS 158286 as of one month before 2024-05-15
failure_condition: Reject if this joint trigger is followed by negative 60-day S&P 500 returns no more often than the unconditional negative-return frequency.

mechanism_narrative: An upward 3-month trend in industrial production signals improving real output and operating leverage, so higher INDPRO momentum predicts positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot INDPRO 102.6577 as of two months before 2024-05-15
failure_condition: Reject if 3-month INDPRO momentum has a nonpositive Rank IC with 20-day S&P 500 returns in at least two consecutive 3-year walk-forward windows.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in housing starts signals falling construction activity, weaker durable-goods demand, and tighter credit-sensitive spending, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST crosses below its trailing 12-month average by more than 10%
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot HOUST 1321 as of two months before 2024-05-15
failure_condition: Reject if triggered HOUST breakdowns are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of walk-forward observations.

mechanism_narrative: When CPI inflation decelerates while the policy rate remains high, markets price future easing without an immediate growth collapse, generating positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized inflation falls for 2 consecutive months while FEDFUNDS remains above 5.0%
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot CPIAUCSL 313.207 and FEDFUNDS 5.33 as of one month before 2024-05-15
failure_condition: Reject if the joint disinflation and high-rate trigger produces average 20-day S&P 500 returns below zero or below unconditional returns.

mechanism_narrative: Very low unemployment with ongoing payroll expansion in a high-rate environment signals labor-market overheating and delayed rate cuts, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE crosses below 4.0% while PAYEMS rises over 3 months and FEDFUNDS exceeds 5.0%
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot UNRATE 3.9, PAYEMS 158286, and FEDFUNDS 5.33
regime_hint: tight labor market under restrictive monetary policy
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations have mean 5-day S&P 500 returns greater than zero or if downside hit rate is below 52% in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: Positive real GDP growth signals broad aggregate-demand expansion and supports expected earnings, so higher GDPC1 growth predicts positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot GDPC1 22768.866 as of four months before 2024-05-15
failure_condition: Reject if GDPC1 quarter-over-quarter growth has Rank IC below 0.03 with 60-day S&P 500 returns over any 5-year walk-forward window.
